stimulus:
While researching a topic, a student has taken the following notes:

  • Archaeologist Dr. Maya Rodriguez founded the Andean Heritage Project to preserve the cultural history of regions in Peru.
  • The Andean Heritage Project has overseen a digital documentation effort to create photographic records of ancient rock art in Peru.
  • Paintings found at the Toro Muerto site are included in the documentation.
  • The Toro Muerto paintings feature geometric patterns and dance figures.
  • Paintings found at the Cerro Mulato site are included in the documentation.
  • The Cerro Mulato paintings feature what are thought to be the earliest depictions of agricultural calendars in the region.
stem: The student wants to emphasize a similarity between the Toro Muerto paintings and the Cerro Mulato paintings. Which choice most effectively uses relevant information from the notes to accomplish this goal?

answerOptions.content: The earliest depictions of agricultural calendars in the region are thought to be featured in the paintings at the Cerro Mulato site in Peru.
The Toro Muerto paintings and the Cerro Mulato paintings are both examples of ancient rock art found in Peru.
In Peru, the paintings at the Toro Muerto site feature geometric patterns and dance figures.
The paintings at the Cerro Mulato site feature agricultural calendars, while those at Toro Muerto feature geometric patterns and dance figures.

rationale:
Choice B is the best answer. This choice compares the Toro Muerto paintings and the Cerro Mulato paintings to one another and emphasizes what they have in common: they are both ancient rock art found in the same region.

Choice A is incorrect. This choice only mentions the Cerro Mulato paintings. It doesn't compare them to the Toro Muerto paintings. Choice C is incorrect. This choice only mentions the Toro Muerto paintings. It doesn't compare them to the Cerro Mulato paintings. Choice D is incorrect. This choice doesn't emphasize a similarity between the two paintings. Instead, it emphasizes a difference: the type of content they depict.
